subcodes.first_line: In this Day the Blessed Tree of Remembrance speaketh forth in the Kingdom of Utterance saying: Well is it with the servant
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم سدره مبارکه ذکر در ملکوت بیان باینکلمه ناطق طوبی لعبد اقبل و آمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
